Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This ordeal... It may be that[n]we brought it upon ourselves.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The fact that a future exists is not[n]a guarantee that all will have access to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's something so obvious...[n]And yet, we did not understand it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We didn't know how to use[n]the key to unlock our future.[n]{f 1 1}
